## Summary

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes and why. -->

## Change type

- [ ] Add resource
- [ ] Remove resource
- [ ] New category (≥3 seed entries)
- [ ] Fix (broken link, typo, miscategorisation)
- [ ] Docs / site

## Why this is awesome

<!-- For new resources: what unique value does this add over entries already present? Maintenance / credibility evidence (last commit, stars, citations, venue). -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have read and followed the guidelines in CONTRIBUTING.md.
- [ ] The resource is not a duplicate.
- [ ] The resource meets the quality standards for its category.
- [ ] Formatting follows the conventions in the Formatting section.
- [ ] Entry is placed in the most specific applicable category, in alphabetical order.
- [ ] Links are working and have no trailing slash.
- [ ] I have provided a clear explanation of why this resource is awesome.
